extraction.one_line_summary: SAGAN Peter won a reduced bunch sprint after Team Sunweb's Keldermann shelled climbers on the final ascent, timing his 180m launch perfectly.
tactical_patterns: Team Sunweb controlled final climb via Keldermann's pace, creating selective sprint finish rather than defending pure sprinters' chances.
Deceuninck Quickstep chased breakaway despite no GC threat, revealing aggressive stage-hunting mentality even while holding yellow.
Costa's 7km solo attack failed because Bora immediately committed domestique support to Sunweb's chase, showing inter-team cooperation patterns.

rider_signals.ZAKARIN Ilnur: negative: dropped on final climb suggests complete loss of Giro form, now targeting only mountain stage opportunism
rider_signals.BOASSON HAGEN Edvald: neutral: chased back from 1-minute deficit after mechanical but effort likely compromised sprint legs
rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: positive: led descent attack despite holding yellow, confirming aggressive racing instinct overrides conservative defense
rider_signals.SAGAN Peter: positive: survived selective climbing pace to win sprint, demonstrating improved climbing form compared to pure sprinters eliminated
rider_signals.KELDERMAN Wilco: positive: Sunweb used him as climb pacer to create selection, unusual role for GC-capable rider reveals team sprint prioritization
